meta.title: Natalia Muzyka — The Woman Who Feels
meta.description: Sexologist, psychologist, book author. Restore connection with yourself, your body and desire.

hero.subtitle: And that can change.
hero.description: When stress disconnects your sensitivity — energy, desire and joy disappear. We know how to bring them back.

items.title: Stress & Exhaustion
items.description: I'm on autopilot. No energy for anything — not work, not family, not myself.

items.title: Relationships & Intimacy
items.description: We live like roommates. My partner is drifting away, intimacy is gone, and I don't know how to fix it.

items.title: Body & Sensitivity
items.description: I don't feel my body. Numbness, disconnection — like living in a spacesuit.

items.title: Confidence & Femininity
items.description: I've stopped feeling like a woman. Where did that lightness and magnetism go?

items.title: Pelvic Floor Health
items.description: Issues after childbirth, discomfort. Nobody talks about this, but it matters.

items.title: Desire & Pleasure
items.description: My desire is gone. I don't experience pleasure and I don't understand why.

steps.title: Nervous System
steps.label: Safety
steps.description: Your internal thermostat is overheated from stress. First, we calm it down.

steps.title: Body & Sensitivity

steps.description: The instrument is out of tune — it needs adjusting. We restore body connection.

steps.title: Energy & Desire
steps.label: Reward
steps.description: When the first two are in order — everything else turns on by itself.

expert.title: Natalia Muzyka
expert.subtitle: Sexologist · Psychologist · Author
expert.bio: I work with hundreds of women worldwide — from Ukraine, Kazakhstan, Europe, Israel, USA and UAE. And I see one pattern: women don't lose desire — they lose connection with themselves.
expert.story: When I started working with clients, I noticed: most think something is wrong with them. But it's not them. Nobody taught us to listen to our bodies and restore that connection.

items.quote: I didn't believe it was possible — to feel alive again. After the first two weeks of the program, I noticed I was smiling for no reason.
items.name: Anna K.

items.quote: My husband and I were like roommates for three years. Now I understand the problem wasn't him — I had stopped feeling myself.
items.name: Marina S.

items.quote: Natalia explains complex things so simply and with humor. No mysticism, just practices that work.
items.name: Elena P.

items.quote: I thought after 40 it was too late. How wrong I was. Six weeks in and I feel better than I did at 30.
items.name: Svetlana M.

items.quote: The program changed not just my relationship with my body, but with my partner. We're truly close again.
items.name: Olga D.

items.quote: I've tried many courses. This is the first where I saw real results within the first month.

items.description: Discover your imbalance type in 2 minutes

items.name: Mini-Course
items.description: First step — basic practices in 3 days

items.question: Will this work for me?
items.answer: If you feel exhausted, disconnected from your body, or have low desire — yes, this is for you. We work with nervous system physiology, not symptoms.

items.question: Is it too late for me?
items.answer: The nervous system restores at any age. Our clients are 25–65 years old — all see results. It's never too late.

items.question: Is this mystical or spiritual?
items.answer: No. Everything is based on nervous system science, somatic psychology and sexology. Natalia studies at a US Sexology Clinic and uses only evidence-based methods.

items.question: How much time does it take?
items.answer: 15–20 minutes per day. The program is 8 weeks, but many notice changes within 2 weeks.

items.question: Does my partner need to participate?
items.answer: No. The program is for you. When you change — the relationship changes. But whether your partner joins is their choice.

items.question: Is this confidential?
items.answer: Absolutely. All data is protected. You can use a pseudonym in the community.

items.question: What's the guarantee?
items.answer: If you completed all practices and saw no result in 8 weeks — we refund. No questions asked.

items.question: I've tried other courses
items.answer: We understand. Most courses work with mindset but ignore the body. We start with the nervous system — that's a different level.
